title: He Raised $26M Betting on Probabilities, Not Guesses | Koah Labs, Nic Baird
summary: Nic Baird, founder of Koah Labs, raised $26M for an ad-monetization platform targeting AI tools. He argues that ads, not subscriptions, are the future for monetizing AI applications, and identifies human trust, not technology, as the real bottleneck limiting AI agent adoption.
